content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Ensures abilities are tied to actual academic skills.
• Prevents passive benefits—forces participation.
• Gamifies engagement while reinforcing real rhetorical techniques.

📜 3. Mastery Exams: The “Thought Purity Test” & Its Risk-Reward System

📜 Now structured as an escalating narrative-based challenge with multiple risk tiers.
✔ Each exam is framed as being inside a dystopian or surreal literary world.
✔ If a student fails, they receive a status effect.
✔ Wins must be consecutive (scrolls are “lost” if interrupted).
✔ Redemption paths exist for failures (see Section 5).

Difficulty Tiers & Thematic Framing
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 82 (chunk 82/555)
